_comment: Only needed if you use JWT-based Box auth in archiver.py (the default .env.example uses Client Credentials Grant instead, which doesn't need this file). Create a Box Custom App (Server Authentication / JWT) at https://app.box.com/developers/console, download its JWT config JSON, save it here as 'box_jwt_config.json', and fill in the real values below.

appAuth.privateKey:
-----BEGIN ENCRYPTED PRIVATE KEY-----
PASTE_YOUR_PRIVATE_KEY_HERE
-----END ENCRYPTED PRIVATE KEY-----
